message: So despite the payments outage the other day Bez tells me we had bumper profits from the flash sale.
In more good news Bez has turned off the Beatles music in head office and we are now all allowed to play whatever we want in our headphones.
I don't know about you but I was getting bored of "I am the walrus" on repeat.
Ooh Coo Ca Choo to that Tinus
Clicked Start button
Everyone listen up I am just got off the phone from our biggest investor Melon Tusk. He told me he was just trying to buy a Candle Holder for his grandma but the website wouldnt let him buy it
Melon is really nervous cause he heard of our outage earlier in the week. Please tell me its a problem with his computer and not a problem with our website.
Tusk might not invest in the next round if we have another serious outage. Help!
Ok everyone you know what to do.  @Damian Heymann lets size up the issue.
I hope it's not payments again. I fear it is.
@Damian Heymann do your thing and lets size this issue up and hopefully it'll be a non event.
Getting lots of calls saying they can't buy stuff it's not just Melon.
Bob we have an investor unable to use our services are we getting any other clients reporting issues ?
i'm seeing number of orders going down on the dashboard
but frontend is up
Oh my knees! Not again. Get this back up fast or we're toast!
*Incident Number INC100022:* clients are unable to coplete sales P1
Damian - Bob isn't there in this channel
Have we got our best people on this?

Damian Heymann
  4:40 PM
@Bob
 we have an investor unable to use our services are we getting any other clients reporting issues ?
Hi Damian - Running the reports now
Daniel Shay front end is up but sales aren't being completed can we please check the cart  checkout and payment services ?
Melon's on the phone asking to join the incident bridge. I told him it's not worth it and it's under control. Don't let me down!
Bob at which stage exactly are customer seeing issues ? can they add items to their cart ?
Damian - most of the reports say they are unable to do check out
and few are unable to add items to their cart
Second time this week folks! My heart can't handle this. Phones ringing off the hook. The chatbot's running at 99% CPU!
Sure
Let me check the logs
Daniel can we chec kthe above services  focusing on checkout ?
How many customers are effected? Is it regional or global?
i see we had two changes could those be the root cause of the issue ?
i see few errors from pods
digging it more
Daniel i see CHG89359 for the payment service could this be the root cause ?
Ad service is non critical app
that shouldn't be related
I have validated the payments change - its good
Bob from an impact perspective are all clients impacted ? is it a regional issue or one for specific products ?
The timing of implementation and errors don't match
or is it a full scale outage ?
Initially reported from UK
But it is global now
getting calls from all regions
do you want me to roll back ?
the issue was initially reported by UK clients but it is now reported globally
It is full outage
I see a lot of errors from Shipping servic epods
Thanks what is the plan to fix the issue? Do you have an ETA to fix?
Daniel i  wasn't talking about theAdService change
the pods are going wild?? they seem to be crashing multiple times and any time they bring themselves back up they crash again - Not sure what's causing this
Daniel if the timings don't match don't roll back but please check the PaymentService change - CHG89359
Yeah - i did check payments change as well - error and client impact and report don't match
its matching shipping service pods error
I see Pods are experiencing high CPU and  memory usage  disk I/O usage is high and network latency seems to be high
Daniel can we restart the shipping service ?
The pods are automatically getting restarted - the load seems to be high on them
But i can restart if you want
Shay can we determine what's causing the spikes ? is it a capacity issue a hung service ? maybe a resource heavy DB query >?
Can we get someone from Platform as wel to check infra details
Daniel if they're already restarting that wont help us
Tanya can you please help ?
looks like the pods for ShippingService are experiencing high CPU can we please check why ?
No changes on Shipping service \nThe load from customers is high - Not sure what is the problem
I took a look at the logs and saw “500-CHECKOUT-INTERNAL-ERROR
Daniel Shay what would that error suggest ?
Daniel can we please check the checkout service ?
Hamed - can you help us here ?
On it
Hamed S can you please assist ?
yeah  i am following the chat . High CPU and memory spikes without any external load
we need to check the Checkout Service as a potential root cause of the issue
500-CHECKOUT-INTERNAL-ERROR" Are we running any scripts that may cause this issue?
We were running Chaos monkey in UAT
no ETA as of yet we're still confirming the root cause at the moment we're checking the CheckOut service as a potential cause
But nothign on PROD
Daniel any possibility of that causing issues in Prod ?
Oh ho
I will take a quick look
Looks like its misconfigured on PROD
Daniel kill it please
I see environmental files were hardcoded
On it
Ok Customers are saying they are now having successful transactions complete
Perfect! @Damian Heymann can you confirm with the team?
I have paused all tests
Ok can i go ahead and tell Melon its ok?
We've identified a misconfigured service which was supposed to run in UAT but due to incorrect config impacted PROD
it's being killed will provide an update as soon as it's down
Thank you for your update
Tanya can we confirm the CPU and memory utilization on the pods ?
Yes could see back to normal
spikes have come down
we are getting all confirmations
Daniel i see no data for order confirmations
are they working now ?
I have validated in logs
we are getting confirmations
Bez looks like we're back up
i will look into dasboard now
On the phone with Melon right now...will keep you posted
Great
Ok he's good
We need a good washup to understand what happened today
orders are back up we've confirmed with both the business and technology orders are being confirmed again
Well done everyone getting to the bottom of it!  Its not easy
